data.content: Split Beats tab into Queues and Active screens. Queues shows ready_for_* states with per-state dropdown; Active shows action states with per-state dropdown. Filter resets on tab switch. Files changed: filter-bar.tsx (ViewPhase type, per-phase state lists), app-header.tsx (Queues+Active tabs replacing Beats), page.tsx (queues/active view handling). Build error on main is pre-existing (Next.js prerender).
